_metadata.purpose: Travel advisory data for security-bodyguard city risk profiles

advisory_levels.AGAINST_ALL_TRAVEL: FCDO advises against all travel (highest risk)
advisory_levels.AGAINST_ESSENTIAL: FCDO advises against all but essential travel
advisory_levels.SEE_WARNINGS: No blanket advisory but specific warnings exist

notes: FCDO data fetched live from gov.uk on 15 April 2026
State Dept data compiled separately in state_dept_data.json
Regional escalation warnings active across Middle East countries due to Iran-Israel conflict
Middle East advisories significantly elevated above normal baseline due to ongoing regional conflict

nigeria.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all travel to parts of Nigeria

against_all_travel: Riverine areas of Delta, Bayelsa, Rivers, Akwa Ibom, Cross River states
against_essential_travel: Non-riverine areas of Delta, Bayelsa, Rivers states

key_threats.terrorism: VERY LIKELY. ISWA and Boko Haram in northeast. Attacks across multiple states including FCT.
key_threats.kidnapping: WIDESPREAD. Criminal and terrorist kidnapping. Affects highways, oil facilities, all regions. NW especially severe (Zamfara, Katsina, Kaduna, Borno, Sokoto). Abuja-Kaduna highway high risk.
key_threats.crime: HIGH. Violent street crime, armed robbery, carjacking on urban and rural roads. Areas around banks/ATMs targeted.
key_threats.piracy: Armed robberies in Nigerian waters and Gulf of Guinea
key_threats.political_instability: Widespread protests, intercommunal violence frequent and without warning

p1_city_implications.Lagos: High crime rates, carjacking, kidnapping risk, financial scams epicentre. Not in FCDO restricted zone but highly dangerous.
p1_city_implications.Abuja: FCT has seen ISWA attacks. Abuja-Kaduna highway kidnapping hotspot. Federal capital has security presence but remains high-risk.

kenya.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all travel to parts of Kenya

against_all_travel: Parts of Wajir County (within 60km of Somalia border)
Parts of Garissa County (within 60km of Somalia border)
Parts of Lamu County (Boni National Reserve and areas within 60km of Somalia border)

key_threats.terrorism: VERY LIKELY. Al Shabaab primary threat. Heightened threat across Kenya including Nairobi. Targets hotels, bars, malls, places of worship.
key_threats.kidnapping: HIGH threat of terrorist kidnap. Westerners/British nationals targeted. Northern counties and coast most exposed.
key_threats.crime: HIGH. Violent mugging, armed robbery, carjacking in Nairobi (Eastleigh, CBD, slums) and Mombasa (Old Town, Likoni Ferry).
key_threats.political_instability: Protests/demonstrations common, especially in Nairobi. Can turn violent.

p1_city_implications.Nairobi: High crime in Eastleigh, CBD, Mathare, Kibera. Carjacking risk especially old airport road/Jogoo Road. Al Shabaab threat to hotels, malls (2019 Riverside attack).

south_africa.advisory_text: No blanket advisory but extensive crime warnings

key_threats.terrorism: LIKELY. Lone actor threat inspired by Daesh. Indiscriminate attacks possible.
key_threats.kidnapping: INCREASING. Criminal kidnap for financial gain. Express kidnappings after dark. Foreign nationals including British targeted.
key_threats.crime: VERY HIGH. Violent mugging, carjacking, smash-and-grab, house robbery, rape, murder. Countrywide but worst in townships, CBDs, isolated areas.
key_threats.vehicle_crime: Common carjacking/robbery especially after dark at traffic lights, junctions, petrol stations. Fake police with blue lights. Cape Town airport road attacks increasing.
key_threats.airport_crime: Criminals follow victims from OR Tambo airport. Targeted attacks on Cape Town airport routes (avoid R300, use M3/N2).

p1_city_implications.Johannesburg: Very high crime. OR Tambo airport targeting. Townships extremely dangerous. CBD high risk. Table Mountain attacks (Lion's Head, Signal Hill).
p1_city_implications.Cape_Town: Airport road attacks escalating. Table Mountain muggings. Township violence. Taxi app crime. Vehicle crime widespread.

colombia.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all but essential travel to parts of Colombia

against_essential_travel: Within 5km of Venezuela border (except Cucuta city centre transit)
Pacific coast departments (Choco, Cauca, Narino, Valle del Cauca non-urban)

key_threats.terrorism: Attacks by ELN and FARC dissidents. Car bombs, IEDs mainly in border/rural areas.
key_threats.kidnapping: Ongoing risk especially in border regions and rural areas
key_threats.crime: High street crime in major cities. Armed robbery, express kidnapping in Bogota, Medellin, Cali.
key_threats.drug_trafficking: Major narcotics transit routes, especially border regions and Pacific coast

p1_city_implications.Bogota: Street crime, armed robbery, express kidnapping. Protests can turn violent. Generally safer in north/business districts.

mexico.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all but essential travel to parts of Mexico

against_essential_travel: Baja California (Tijuana city limits and Tecate municipality)

key_threats.crime: Serious organised crime and gang violence. Cartel turf wars in restricted states.
key_threats.kidnapping: Risk across Mexico. Express kidnapping and virtual kidnapping schemes.
key_threats.drug_trafficking: Major trafficking routes through restricted states. Violence between cartels.
key_threats.road_safety: Dangerous driving conditions. Armed highway robberies. Avoid night travel.

p1_city_implications.Mexico_City: Not in restricted zone. Street crime, express kidnapping, taxi crime. Generally safer in major tourist/business areas (Polanco, Reforma, Condesa).

turkey.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all travel to within 10km of Syria border

key_threats.terrorism: LIKELY. PKK, Daesh, and far-left groups. Istanbul, Ankara most exposed urban areas. Heightened due to regional escalation.
key_threats.political_instability: Protests possible. Regional Middle East escalation poses security risks.
key_threats.crime: Pickpocketing, bag snatching in tourist areas. Scams targeting foreigners.

p1_city_implications.Istanbul: Terrorism risk (previous attacks on airport, nightclubs, metro). Petty crime in tourist areas. Regional escalation risk. Major economic hub requiring executive protection.

saudi_arabia.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all travel to within 10km of Yemen border. Against all but essential to Eastern Province and Riyadh Province.

key_threats.terrorism: Missile and drone attacks across Saudi Arabia from Houthi forces and Iran. Risk of debris from interceptions.
key_threats.regional_conflict: Iranian strikes risk on civilian infrastructure (ports, hotels, airports, energy facilities, roads). Regional escalation significant.
key_threats.missile_drone: Continued missile and drone attacks. Shelter-in-place protocols active.
key_threats.photography: Illegal to film government buildings, military installations, palaces. No footage of missiles/interceptions.

p1_city_implications.Riyadh: ENTIRE PROVINCE under against-essential advisory. Missile/drone attack risk. Iranian targeting of US/Israel-linked locations. Active military operations in region.

uae.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all but essential travel to United Arab Emirates (entire country)

key_threats.regional_conflict: Iranian targeting of US/Israel-linked locations. Risk of missile/drone attacks on civilian infrastructure.
key_threats.missile_drone: Risk of debris from intercepted missiles/drones. Shelter protocols in place.
key_threats.posting_restrictions: Illegal to post material critical of UAE government, companies, or individuals online including video/photos of incidents.
key_threats.embassy_status: UK dependants temporarily withdrawn from UAE as precautionary measure.

p1_city_implications.Dubai: ENTIRE UAE under against-essential advisory due to regional escalation. Major international business hub. Iranian strike risk on infrastructure. Large expatriate community requiring protection.

india.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all travel to parts of India

against_all_travel: Within 10km of India-Pakistan border (Wagah-Attari crossing closed)
Union Territory of Jammu and Kashmir (including Pahalgam, Gulmarg, Sonamarg, Srinagar, Jammu-Srinagar highway) except air travel to/from Jammu city and within Jammu city
against_essential_travel: Manipur state including Imphal (ethnic clashes ongoing since 2023)

key_threats.terrorism: Risk of attacks including in major cities. Naxalite insurgency in central/eastern India. Kashmir conflict.
key_threats.crime: Petty crime, scams, sexual assault risk especially for women travellers. Pickpocketing in tourist areas.
key_threats.political_instability: Protests/demonstrations can occur. India-Pakistan tensions elevated (border closed).
key_threats.regional_conflict: India-Pakistan border tensions. Wagah-Attari crossing closed. Manipur ethnic violence ongoing.

p1_city_implications.Mumbai: Not in restricted zone. Terrorism risk (2008 attacks precedent). Petty crime, scams. Major financial hub. Sexual assault risk.
p1_city_implications.Delhi: Not in restricted zone but near Pakistan border tension zone. Crime, scams, air quality issues. Political demonstrations common.

russia.advisory_text: FCDO advises against ALL travel to Russia (entire country)

key_threats.invasion_of_ukraine: Continuing invasion. Drone attacks, security incidents across Russia including near Moscow.
key_threats.detention_risk: INCREASED risk of British nationals being detained. Russia targets foreign nationals as leverage. Activities outside Russia may be used as basis for detention.
key_threats.terrorism: HIGH likelihood of attacks including in major cities (Moscow Crocus City Hall 2024 attack).
key_threats.conscription: Male dual nationals aged 18-30 may face compulsory military service. Draft notices prevent departure.
key_threats.no_flights: Lack of direct flights to UK. Limited return options.
key_threats.limited_support: UK government support severely limited. Embassy open but very limited in-person support.

p1_city_implications.Moscow: ENTIRE COUNTRY under against-all-travel. Detention risk for British nationals. Terrorism threat. Drone attacks. No direct flights. Conscription risk for dual nationals.

brazil.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all but essential travel to parts of Brazil

against_essential_travel: Western Amazonas State river areas (Amazon River tributaries west of Codajas, Itaquai River, Japura River, Rio Negro north/west of Barcelos)

key_threats.crime: HIGH violent crime in major cities. Favela violence, armed robbery, carjacking. Gang warfare in Rio, Sao Paulo.
key_threats.drug_trafficking: Major trafficking routes through Amazon region

p1_city_implications.Sao_Paulo: Not in restricted zone. High violent crime, favela areas extremely dangerous, carjacking, armed robbery. Major business hub requiring executive protection.

philippines.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all travel to western and central Mindanao and Sulu archipelago

against_essential_travel: Remainder of Mindanao (except Camiguin, Dinagat, Siargao islands)

key_threats.terrorism: Terrorist activity and military-insurgent clashes in southern Philippines. Abu Sayyaf, Maute groups.
key_threats.kidnapping: Kidnap-for-ransom in Mindanao/Sulu. Foreign nationals targeted.
key_threats.crime: Petty crime, scams in Manila. Drug war violence.
key_threats.demonstrations: Large-scale demonstrations expected in Metro Manila

p1_city_implications.Manila: Not in restricted zone. Crime, scams, protests. Traffic congestion extreme. Drug war violence (reduced but ongoing).

pakistan.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all travel to parts of Pakistan, against essential to other parts

against_all_travel: Multiple areas of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa (Bajaur, Bannu, Buner, Charsadda, Dera Ismail Khan, Hangu, Karak, Khyber, Kohat, Kurram, Lakki Marwat, Upper/Lower Dir, Mohmand, Orakzai, Peshawar, Swat, Tank, N&S Waziristan)
N45 Highway (Mardan to Chitral including Kalash valley)
Within 10 miles of Line of Control (Kashmir)
against_essential_travel: Parts of KPK (Malakand, Mardan, Nowshera, Shangla, Swabi)
Within 5 miles of India border (except closed Wagah/Kartarpur crossings)
Sindh Province north of Nawabshah including city

key_threats.terrorism: VERY HIGH. TTP, ISIL-K, sectarian groups. Attacks on military, government, religious targets. IEDs, suicide bombings.
key_threats.kidnapping: Risk across Pakistan. Foreign workers targeted.
key_threats.regional_tensions: Pakistan-Afghanistan tensions. Pakistan-India tensions (border closed). Drone activity in some cities.
key_threats.political_instability: Protests in major cities. Road restrictions and curfews at short notice. Internet outages.
key_threats.airspace: Closures due to Middle East escalation and India tensions

p1_city_implications.Karachi: Not in blanket restricted zone but Sindh has partial restrictions. Terrorism, kidnapping, sectarian violence, crime. Major port city. Target-rich environment.
p1_city_implications.Islamabad: Adjacent to restricted KPK. Protests common. Better security than other cities but terrorism risk remains.

thailand.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all but essential travel to parts of Thailand

against_essential_travel: Southern Songkhla Province (Chana, Thepa, Na Thawi, Saba Yoi districts)
Hat Yai to Padang Besar train line

key_threats.terrorism: Islamist insurgency in deep south (Pattani, Yala, Narathiwat). Regular attacks near Malaysia border.
key_threats.crime: Petty crime, scams, drink spiking in tourist areas. Bag snatching.
key_threats.border_conflict: Thailand-Cambodia border fighting (July 2025, Dec 2025). Landmines in border area.
key_threats.road_safety: High road fatality rate. Motorcycle accidents common.

p1_city_implications.Bangkok: Not in restricted zone. Petty crime, scams, drink spiking. Protests possible. Generally safe for business travel with precautions.

indonesia.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all travel to areas around active volcanoes

against_all_travel: Mount Lewotobi Laki-Laki crater (7km radius), Flores
Mount Sinabung crater (5km radius), North Sumatra
Mount Marapi crater (3km radius), West Sumatra
Mount Semeru crater (5km radius), East Java
Mount Ruang crater (7km radius), Northern Sulawesi
Mount Ibu crater (7km radius), North Maluku

key_threats.terrorism: LIKELY. Jemaah Islamiyah and ISIS-aligned groups. Previous attacks in Jakarta, Bali.
key_threats.natural_disasters: Earthquakes, tsunamis, volcanic eruptions. Frequent and severe.
key_threats.crime: Petty crime in tourist areas, scams.
key_threats.regional_risk: Middle East escalation causing travel disruption

p1_city_implications.Jakarta: Not in volcano restricted zones. Terrorism risk (previous attacks). Crime, flooding, traffic. Major business hub.

uk.advisory_text: Domestic - no FCDO advisory. UK counter-terrorism threat level: SUBSTANTIAL.

key_threats.terrorism: SUBSTANTIAL threat level. Islamist and far-right extremism.
key_threats.crime: Knife crime, gang violence in urban areas. Organised crime.

p2_city_implications.London: Major global city. Terrorism target. Knife crime. Organised crime. VIP/celebrity protection market leader.

usa.advisory_text: No blanket advisory but specific warnings on gun violence, mass shootings

key_threats.gun_violence: Mass shooting risk. High gun ownership. Active shooter incidents.
key_threats.crime: Varies by city. Gang violence in some urban areas.
key_threats.terrorism: Domestic extremism and lone actor attacks.

p2_city_implications.New_York: Low crime for US major city but still requires awareness. Mass shooting risk. Major VIP protection market.

key_threats.terrorism: HIGH threat. Multiple previous attacks (Bataclan, Nice, Charlie Hebdo). Islamist and lone actor.
key_threats.crime: Pickpocketing, bag snatching in Paris tourist areas and transport. Suburbs can be dangerous.
key_threats.protests: Yellow vest style protests. Can turn violent.

p2_city_implications.Paris: Terrorism risk (highest in Europe historically). Petty crime in tourist areas. Executive protection demand for luxury/fashion sector.

key_threats.terrorism: LIKELY. Christmas market attack precedent (Berlin 2016, Magdeburg 2024). Islamist and far-right.
key_threats.crime: Pickpocketing in tourist areas and transport hubs.

p2_city_implications.Berlin: Terrorism risk. Low violent crime. Major business/diplomatic hub.

japan.advisory_text: No specific travel advisory. Middle East disruption may affect transit.

key_threats.terrorism: LOW but not zero. Aum Shinrikyo precedent.
key_threats.natural_disasters: Earthquakes, typhoons, tsunamis. Major risk factor.
key_threats.crime: Very low violent crime. Some pickpocketing in tourist areas.

p2_city_implications.Tokyo: Very safe city. Low crime. Earthquake/natural disaster risk. Executive protection for high-profile business visitors.

hong_kong.advisory_text: No blanket advisory. Warnings on National Security Law, dual nationality risks.

key_threats.national_security_law: Broad national security legislation. Risk of detention for political activities/speech. Extra-territorial reach.
key_threats.dual_nationality: HK does not recognise dual nationality. BN(O) passport not valid. Chinese nationals treated as such. Consular support may be unavailable.
key_threats.crime: Low violent crime.

p2_city_implications.Hong_Kong: Low street crime. NSL detention risk for political/media figures. Dual nationality complications. Major financial hub.

singapore.advisory_text: No specific travel advisory. Severe drug penalties warning.

key_threats.terrorism: LOW but regional proximity to threats.
key_threats.drugs: SEVERE penalties including death penalty for drug offences. Drug traces on arrival lead to arrest.
key_threats.crime: Very low.

p2_city_implications.Singapore: Extremely safe city. Minimal crime. Drug law severity. Executive protection for high-profile visits to hostile regulatory environment.

australia.advisory_text: No specific travel advisory. Bushfire warnings seasonal.

key_threats.terrorism: PROBABLE (Australian government assessment). Lone actor attacks possible.
key_threats.crime: Low violent crime.

p2_city_implications.Sydney: Low crime. Bushfire risk in surrounding areas. Major business hub.

qatar.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all but essential travel to Qatar (entire country)

key_threats.regional_conflict: Iranian targeting risk. Missile/drone debris risk. Regional escalation.
key_threats.shelter_protocols: Warning alerts and interception sounds. Shelter-in-place required.
key_threats.posting_restrictions: Similar to UAE restrictions on social media content about incidents.

p2_city_implications.Doha: ENTIRE COUNTRY under against-essential. Iranian strike risk. Shelter protocols active. Major business hub. Limited commercial flights.

kuwait.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all but essential travel to Kuwait (entire country)

key_threats.regional_conflict: Iranian targeting risk. Missile/drone attacks. Regional escalation.
key_threats.border_restrictions: Iraq-Kuwait border closed. Saudi crossings open but restricted.
key_threats.exit_permits: British nationals may need exit permits via Sahel app.

p2_city_implications.Kuwait_City: ENTIRE COUNTRY under against-essential. Iranian strike risk. Border restrictions. Oil infrastructure targeting risk.

ghana.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all but essential travel to Bawku Municipality

against_essential_travel: Bawku Municipal area, Upper East region

key_threats.crime: Petty crime, armed robbery. Scams targeting foreigners.

p2_city_implications.Accra: Not in restricted zone. Moderate crime levels. Growing business hub for West Africa.

tanzania.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all but essential travel within 20km of Mozambique border (Cabo Delgado)

against_essential_travel: Within 20km of Mozambique border (Cabo Delgado province)

key_threats.terrorism: Islamic extremism threat near Mozambique border. Spillover risk.
key_threats.crime: Petty crime, theft in tourist areas and Dar es Salaam.

p2_city_implications.Dar_es_Salaam: Not in restricted zone. Street crime, theft. Growing East African business hub.

ethiopia.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all travel to multiple regions including Tigray, Amhara, Gambela

against_all_travel: Within 100km of Somalia/Kenya border in Somali region
Parts of Oromia (West/East/Kellem/Horo Gudru Wollega zones, parts of North Shewa)
Parts of Benishangul-Gumuz (near Sudan, Metekel, Maokomo zones)
against_essential_travel: Parts of Oromia (East Shewa zone, A4 road, North Shewa, West/East Guji)
Somali region (Siti, Nogob, Jarar, Shabelle, Korahe, Dollo, parts of Liben/Afder zones)

key_threats.armed_conflict: Post-Tigray war instability. Amhara militia conflict. Oromia insurgency. Multiple active conflict zones.
key_threats.kidnapping: Risk in border areas and conflict zones
key_threats.fuel_shortages: Current fuel shortages causing transport disruption
key_threats.no_consular_support: Embassy cannot support in against-travel zones

p2_city_implications.Addis_Ababa: Capital not in restricted zone but surrounded by conflict areas (Oromia, Amhara). Fuel shortages. Protests possible. Growing African Union/diplomatic hub.

peru.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all but essential travel to Colombia border area and VRAEM

against_essential_travel: Within 20km of Peru-Colombia border (Loreto, except Amazon River and Caballococha-Santa Rosa area)
Valley of Apurimac, Ene and Mantaro Rivers (VRAEM)

key_threats.crime: Street crime, theft, express kidnapping in Lima. Protests can be violent.
key_threats.state_of_emergency: Active state of emergency. Gas pipeline rupture causing natural gas shortage in Lima/Callao.
key_threats.political_instability: Frequent protests, roadblocks. Emergency measures include remote working mandates.

p2_city_implications.Lima: State of emergency active. Natural gas shortage disruption. Street crime, express kidnapping. Emergency measures affecting movement.

key_threats.crime: Petty crime, bag snatching in Buenos Aires. Express kidnapping rarely.
key_threats.protests: Economic protests possible. Can cause disruption.

p2_city_implications.Buenos_Aires: Moderate crime levels. Pickpocketing, distraction theft. Economic instability drives crime fluctuations.

chile.advisory_text: No blanket advisory but severe wildfire warnings in southern regions

key_threats.terrorism: LIKELY (updated assessment). Emerging threat.
key_threats.natural_disasters: Severe wildfires in Nuble and Biobio. Earthquakes, tsunamis.
key_threats.crime: Street crime in Santiago. Armed robbery.

p2_city_implications.Santiago: Street crime, armed robbery. Protests possible. Generally safer than other Latin American capitals.

china.advisory_text: No blanket advisory. Detention risk warnings. Separate pages for Hong Kong and Macao.

key_threats.detention_risk: Risk of arbitrary detention. National security laws broadly applied. Exit bans possible.
key_threats.surveillance: Extensive state surveillance. Digital monitoring of communications.
key_threats.crime: Low violent crime. Scams targeting foreigners.

p2_city_implications.Beijing: Low street crime. Detention/exit ban risk for business disputes. Surveillance. Political sensitivity around foreign business.
p2_city_implications.Shanghai: Low street crime. Same detention risks as Beijing. Major financial hub. Scams.

israel.advisory_text: FCDO advises against ALL travel to Israel and Palestine (entire territory)

key_threats.active_conflict: Ongoing military operations. Rocket/drone attacks throughout Israel. Missile debris from interceptions.
key_threats.regional_escalation: Iranian strikes on civilian infrastructure. Multiple front conflict.
key_threats.limited_flights: Ben Gurion Airport limited schedule (El Al, Israir, Arkia, Air Haifa only). Passenger limits.
key_threats.gaza: Border crossings closed. No exit routes from Gaza for civilians.
key_threats.embassy_status: UK dependants withdrawn from Tel Aviv as precaution.

p2_city_implications.Tel_Aviv: ENTIRE COUNTRY against-all-travel. Active conflict. Rocket attacks. Limited flights. Iranian strike risk. UK staff dependants withdrawn.

egypt.advisory_text: FCDO advises against all travel to parts of Egypt

against_all_travel: Within 20km of Libya border (except El Salloum which is against-essential)
against_essential_travel: Northern South Sinai (beyond St Catherine-Nuweibaa road, except coastal areas)
Ismailiyah Governorate east of Suez Canal
Western Desert (with extensive exceptions for major tourist/oasis routes)
Hala'ib Triangle and Bir Tawil Trapezoid

key_threats.terrorism: Risk in Sinai. Security forces operations ongoing.
key_threats.regional_conflict: Israel-Palestine conflict. Rafah crossing closed. Taba crossing operational but charges volatile.
key_threats.crime: Petty crime. Sexual harassment risk.

p2_city_implications.Cairo: Not in restricted zone. Terrorism risk (2019 bus bomb). Petty crime. Regional tension spillover. Major business/diplomatic hub.

key_threats.terrorism: LIKELY. Previous attacks (Marrakech 2011). Authorities maintain high security posture.
key_threats.crime: Petty crime, bag snatching, scams especially in tourist areas/medinas.
key_threats.natural_disasters: Earthquake risk (2023 Al Haouz earthquake precedent).

p2_city_implications.Casablanca: Moderate crime. Major business hub for North Africa. Terrorism awareness required.
